creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
sysutils/klaptopdaemon fails to build after KDE 3.5.9 upgrade due to patches failing to be applied:

/usr/ports/sysutils/klaptopdaemon [root]# make
===>  Found saved configuration for kdeutils-klaptopdaemon-3.5.7_1
===>  Extracting for kdeutils-klaptopdaemon-3.5.9
===>  Patching for kdeutils-klaptopdaemon-3.5.9
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/sysutils/klaptopdaemon/files/extrapatch-acpi-support
1 out of 4 hunks failed--saving rejects to klaptopdaemon/portable.cpp.rej
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/klaptopdaemon.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/klaptopdaemon.

How-To-Repeat: see "full description"
